summary: Counselor App scroll fix verified. All 10 features tested and passing. The CSS changes successfully fixed the iOS scroll trapping issue - page now scrolls naturally to show all 19 campers. GPS status, attendance marking, stats bar, and logout all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: CSS fix correctly removes overflow restrictions from parent elements via useEffect
counselor-page class with overflow:visible !important properly allows body-level scrolling
All 19 campers render correctly with proper data-testid attributes (camper-row-0 through camper-row-18)
Sticky header stays fixed while content scrolls - good UX pattern
GPS error state handled gracefully with Retry button appearing when GPS is 'error'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Counselor app scroll fix verified working. Key CSS changes: removed overflowY, touchAction, position:relative from main container; added counselor-page class with overflow:visible. Page scrolls at body level. GPS shows 'GPS Off' in test env (no real GPS) with Retry button - this is expected behavior.

features_tested.login_page_loads: PASS - /counselor loads with bus number input, data-testid='counselor-login'
features_tested.login_with_pin_1: PASS - PIN '1' logs in as Bus #01 with 19 campers
features_tested.all_19_campers_rendered: PASS - All 19 camper rows visible (camper-row-0 through camper-row-18)
features_tested.page_scrolls_to_last_camper: PASS - camper-row-18 (Kira Warshawski) accessible via scroll
features_tested.attendance_present_button: PASS - Clicking present button updates row color to green (#f0fdf4) and stats
features_tested.attendance_absent_button: PASS - Clicking absent button updates row color to red (#fef2f2) and stats
features_tested.gps_status_badge: PASS - GPS status badge visible in header showing 'GPS Off'
features_tested.gps_retry_button: PASS - Retry button appears when GPS status is 'error'
features_tested.logout_button: PASS - Logout returns to login screen
features_tested.stats_bar_counts: PASS - Present/Absent/Unmarked/Total counts update correctly after marking attendance

api_tests.POST /api/bus-tracking/login: PASS - Returns bus data with 19 campers for pin '1'
